title: Chennai Weather Forecast & Update for Today, Wednesday, 08 July 2026: Overcast Skies and Peak Heat, High of 39°C - LatestLY

Chennai Weather Forecast & Update for Today, Wednesday, 08 July 2026: Overcast Skies and Peak Heat, High of 39°C
Chennai's weather on Wednesday, 08 July 2026, will be characterized by overcast skies and significant heat, with the temperature expected to reach a high of 39°C. The 'feels like' temperature will be around 34°C, with humidity at 42%. A slight chance of rain is present in the early afternoon. Prepare for a hot and humid day across the city.
Chennai will experience overcast conditions on Wednesday, 08 July 2026, with temperatures climbing to a sweltering high of 39°C. The 'feels like' temperature will hover around 34°C, while the low is expected to be 30°C. Humidity will be at 42%, with winds reaching speeds of up to 19 km/h. A minimal chance of rain, around 10% overall, is forecast.
Chennai, Tamil Nadu Weather Live Tracker Map on Windy
The day will start with a mild 33°C at midnight under overcast skies, gradually warming up. By noon, the temperature will reach 37°C, with a slight increase in the chance of rain to 4%. The peak heat of 39°C is anticipated around 2 PM, accompanied by a 16% chance of precipitation and winds dropping to 13 km/h. Residents should prepare for significant heat throughout the afternoon, despite the cloud cover.
